entries.title: Upload payload ceiling
entries.content: Documents larger than 50 MiB are rejected.

entries.title: Accepted document formats
entries.content: Only PDF and PNG documents are accepted.

entries.title: Uploader authorization
entries.content: Only authenticated users holding the uploader role may submit documents.

entries.title: Request throttling
entries.content: Each user may make 10 upload requests per minute.

entries.title: Invoice schedule
entries.content: Invoices are generated on the first day of each month.

entries.title: Password recovery
entries.content: Password reset links expire after fifteen minutes.

entries.title: Session lifetime
entries.content: Login access tokens expire after thirty minutes.

entries.title: Audit retention
entries.content: Security audit events are retained for seven years.

entries.title: Database rollout
entries.content: Schema migrations run before application startup.

entries.title: Profile cache
entries.content: User profiles are cached for five minutes.

entries.title: Supported locales
entries.content: The interface supports English, Chinese, and Japanese.

entries.title: Health endpoint
entries.content: GET /health returns readiness and liveness state.

entries.title: Image previews
entries.content: Uploaded images receive a 320 pixel thumbnail.

entries.title: Webhook authentication
entries.content: Webhook payloads are verified with a rotating HMAC secret.

entries.title: Customer export
entries.content: Operators can download the customer directory as a CSV file.

entries.title: Account deletion
entries.content: Closed accounts are permanently erased after thirty days.

queries.expansion: 文档大小限制 最大文件大小 上传大小 upload size limit max file size MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES

queries.query: who is allowed to submit a file
queries.expansion: uploader role authorized upload submit document authentication

queries.query: 上传接口被打得太频繁时怎么限流
queries.expansion: 上传限流 请求频率 upload rate limit throttling requests per minute

queries.query: rotate the secret used to authenticate webhooks
queries.expansion: webhook secret rotation HMAC signing authentication

queries.query: 把客户名单导出成表格
queries.expansion: 客户目录 导出 CSV customer directory export download

queries.query: when does a login token expire
queries.expansion: access token expiration session lifetime login token TTL
